sql_array: CREATE TABLE user_ips (username String, ip_address IPv6) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY username;
UPDATE user_ips SET ip_address = 'fe80::1' WHERE username = 'alice';
SELECT username, toTypeName(ip_address), hex(ip_address) FROM user_ips WHERE ip_address = '2607:f0d0:1002:51::4';
SELECT DISTINCT username FROM user_ips WHERE ip_address != '::1';
